mapper.select: select id, article_id, raw_content, translated_content_zh, content_extract_status, translation_status, token_usage, copyright_mode, create_time, update_time from tech_briefing_article_content where article_id = #{articleId} limit 1
mapper.update: update tech_briefing_article_content set raw_content = #{rawContent}, translated_content_zh = #{translatedContentZh}, content_extract_status = #{contentExtractStatus}, translation_status = #{translationStatus}, token_usage = #{tokenUsage}, copyright_mode = #{copyrightMode} where article_id = #{articleId}
